target_rules: Preserve the source object name exactly unless the source SQL explicitly renames it.
Do not emit Snowflake-only clauses, object parameters, or warehouse-specific syntax.

unsupported_object_types.trigger: Snowflake trigger migration is not supported because Snowflake sources do not provide trigger objects in this tool.
unsupported_object_types.event: Snowflake event migration is not supported by this tool.
unsupported_object_types.cursor: Standalone cursor objects are not supported as migratable objects for MySQL in this tool.
unsupported_object_types.sequence: MySQL does not support standalone sequence objects in a Snowflake-compatible way. Convert manually to AUTO_INCREMENT or sequence emulation.
unsupported_object_types.synonym: MySQL does not support synonym objects. Convert manually to views or application-level indirection.

table: Convert Snowflake data types and defaults to valid MySQL equivalents.
Preserve source business column names needed for later data copy.
storedprocedure: Convert Snowflake procedure syntax to one valid MySQL CREATE PROCEDURE statement without DELIMITER directives.
function: Convert Snowflake function syntax to one valid MySQL CREATE FUNCTION statement.
